name: pluralize
description: Basic pluralization based on count. Returns singular or plural form of a word depending on the numeric count value.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the count dynamically.

count.description: The numeric count used to determine singular or plural. Can be a literal number or a DynamicNumber referencing a data model path.

singular.description: The singular form of the word.

plural.description: The plural form of the word. Defaults to singular + 's' if omitted.

targetPath.description: Optional data model path to write the result to.
